title: Perry King

{{Top|rwp}}
{{Person

|birth=

'''Perry King''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who portrayed [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] in the [[Star Wars radio dramas]]<ref name="RadioDramas" /> and the [[1997]] read–alongs of the [[original trilogy]].<ref name="ANH">''[[A New Hope Read-Along]]''</ref> The same read–along audio was later used in the [[2015]] [[canon]] read-along storybooks of the Original trilogy.<ref name="ANH" />
